_comment: Copy this file to docs/data/news/<your-id>.json and fill in each field. The filename must match the id field (e.g. artifex-v2.json for id 'artifex-v2').
_id_comment: REQUIRED. Unique kebab-case slug. Must match the filename without .json. No spaces, lowercase only. Example: 'rfp-copilot-launch'.
_date_comment: REQUIRED. ISO 8601 date string (YYYY-MM-DD). Items are sorted newest-first by this field on the site.
_tag_comment: REQUIRED. Short category label shown as a badge on the card. Conventional values: Release, Update, Field note, Talk.
title: Your self-contained headline — keep it under 120 characters.
_title_comment: REQUIRED. The headline IS the story. Write it so no body paragraph is needed. Max ~120 characters. End with a full stop.
_href_comment: OPTIONAL. URL the card links to when clicked. Use a full https:// URL for external links (opens in new tab), or a relative path like 'sap-blog-tracker.html' for internal gallery pages (opens in same tab). If omitted the card is non-interactive.
